metadata.source_paper: Hikmy, I. G., Rudyawan, A., Putri, B. S., Sapiie, B., & Gunawan, I. (2025). The uplift rate of Sulawesi East Arm and the activity of Batui Fault using a tectonic geomorphology approach in the Luwuk Area, Sulawesi. Jurnal Geologi dan Sumberdaya Mineral, 26(1), 1–15. https://doi.org/10.33332/jgsm.geologi.v26i1.663
metadata.extractor: Claude paper-extractor v4 (Fig. 3 lectura visual de ejes)
metadata.region: East Arm Sulawesi — Lobu Watershed, Luwuk area (122°30'E–122°50'E, 0°20'S–0°55'S)
metadata.comprehension_summary: Estudio de geomorfologia tectonica del Lobu Watershed (NW de Luwuk). Eje Fig. 3: 122°30'E-122°50'E, 0°20'S-0°55'S. Batui Thrust confirmada activa por 8 indices morfometricos. Uplift rate 0.213+-0.046 mm/yr. Fault plane N256°E/58°NW.
main_conclusions: Batui Thrust confirmed active: Smf near 1.0; Vf<=0.2 all watersheds; knickpoints Hako River
Uplift rate East Arm: 0.213+-0.046 mm/yr from Salodik Group limestone elevation
Fault plane N256°E/58°NW; Left Thrust Slip (Rickard 1972)
Lobu Watershed: 5 of 6 sub-watersheds classified Most Active Tectonics
Batui Thrust segmented: knickpoint only in Hako profile, not Senseiyan and Luwaan
figures_used: Fig. 3 (slope map Lobu Watershed, axes read)

properties.name: Batui Thrust — activa confirmada geomorfologia (Fig. 3 coordenadas revisadas)
properties.full_name: Batui Thrust — NE-SW active thrust, ESO/Banggai-Sula boundary, Luwuk area (Hikmy et al. 2025)
properties.activity_indices: Smf~1.0; Vf<=0.2 all sub-watersheds; knickpoints Hako River
properties.segmentation_note: Knickpoint only in Hako profile — thrust segmented along strike
properties.paper_finding: Batui Thrust active NE-SW; uplift 0.213 mm/yr; fault plane N256/58NW; segmented
properties.extraction_notes: Traza actualizada con ejes de Fig. 3 (122°30'E-122°50'E, 0°20'S-0°55'S). El Batui Thrust corre NE-SW desde SW hacia NE a traves del watershed y continua al E de Luwuk. Traza extendida al SW (hacia cuenca Banggai) y al NE (hacia Poh Head) respecto a la version anterior.

conclusions.text: Batui Thrust confirmed active; uplift 0.213±0.046 mm/yr; segmented — active segment confirmed in Hako sub-watershed, questionable in Senseiyan-Luwaan
conclusions.geodyn_implication: Tasa de alzamiento baja pero activa — collision Banggai-Sula aun en progreso; la segmentacion del Batui Thrust implica que no todo el frente es igualmente activo en el mismo ciclo sismico

conclusions.text: Fault plane N256°E/58°NW; slickensides + fault breccias + shear fractures confirm thrust kinematics in field
conclusions.geodyn_implication: Cinematica de cabalgamiento confirmada en campo — consistente con el modelo de piel delgada NW-vergente de Husein 2014

properties.name: Pasini Thrust — activa paralela a Batui
properties.full_name: Pasini Thrust — NE-SW active thrust parallel to Batui Thrust, Luwuk area
properties.paper_finding: Pasini Thrust active alongside Batui; morphometric anomalies confirm
properties.extraction_notes: Traza SW del Batui Thrust, paralela, derivada de descripcion textual. Actualizada con escala del area de estudio de Fig. 3.

conclusions.text: Pasini Thrust active simultaneously with Batui Thrust — distributed deformation across the Luwuk thrust belt
conclusions.geodyn_implication: Sistema de cabalgamientos distribuidos en el brazo este — deformacion no concentrada en una sola falla sino en un frente de 10-20 km de ancho

properties.name: Lobu Watershed — area de estudio geomorfologico
properties.full_name: Lobu Watershed study area — tectonic geomorphology, NW of Luwuk, drains N to Gulf of Tomini
properties.paper_finding: Lobu Watershed axis from Fig. 3: 122°30'-122°50'E, 0°20'-0°55'S; all Vf<=0.2
properties.extraction_notes: Poligono actualizado desde ejes de Fig. 3 leidos visualmente. Ubicado al NW de Luwuk [122.79,-1.03], drenando norte hacia el Golfo de Tomini. Version anterior tenia el watershed demasiado al sur.

conclusions.text: Lobu Watershed (NW of Luwuk, 122°30'-50'E, 0°20'-55'S): 5/6 sub-watersheds Most Active Tectonics; all Vf<=0.2
conclusions.geodyn_implication: El brazo este en el area Luwuk es una zona de deformacion activa intensa — coherente con la colision en progreso de Banggai-Sula

properties.name: Perfil sismico offshore brazo E — Batui Thrust (Hartanto 2019 mod.)
properties.full_name: Modified seismic cross-section offshore South Coast East Arm — Batui Thrust geometry (after Hartanto 2019)
properties.paper_finding: Offshore seismic confirms thin-skinned Batui Thrust; ESO/Banggai-Sula boundary at depth
properties.extraction_notes: Traza E-W aprox. al sur de la costa del brazo este, lat ~-1.2S.

conclusions.text: Offshore seismic confirms Batui Thrust as thin-skinned ESO/Banggai-Sula boundary at depth
conclusions.geodyn_implication: Geometria subsuperficial del Batui Thrust confirma modelo piel delgada — consistente con Husein 2014 y Baillie 2022
